reasoning: This workout is designed to improve your lactate clearance and build fatigue resistance. Your last ride was at 66% FTP, indicating a recovery period; it's time to challenge your limiters. Performing over-unders will simulate the demands of the Alpine Loop by fluctuating between just below and above your threshold, which is critical for maintaining 220-235W on the key segment of the climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Repeat 6 x (6 min at 201-218W followed by 3 min at 242-256W)

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
